violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interiors not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin coolers noted not in good repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls and ceiling in the walk-in cooler noted in need of cleaning. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the food prep area noted not smooth easily cleanable.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Exhaust hood and filters noted need cleaning.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): Inadequate sanitizing with quaternary ammonia was noted in the three compartment sink in the bar. Sink drained and refilled with adequate sanitizer
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Exhaust hood and filters noted need cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the food prep area noted not smooth easily cleanable.
